title: Why did Tom Segura and Christina P separate after their 18-year marriage? Podcasters’ split details emerge
summary_full: Tom Segura and Christina P have reportedly separated after 18 years of marriage, according to TMZ. The news has surprised many fans who have followed the couple’s journey through comedy, podcasts and television projects. While the pair have remained largely private about the situation, reports suggest they will continue working together, leaving plenty of questions still unanswered.
